falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 5% or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish move would contradict the current HOLD signal and suggest a reversal of the bottom_2024_aug pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX Volatility Index drops below 15 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp decline in volatility would indicate reduced market stress, invalidating the current blowoff score and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report exceeds 250,000 jobs added in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Surprisingly strong employment data would undermine the current pattern match and suggest a different macroeconomic trajectory.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
